blocks.text: smiled at the water. She didn't make it a bigger moment than it was.
understood. She looked at the water too.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Hey — you two just get in?

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: About an hour ago. I'm Mara. This is Julian.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Marcus. We're next door — the big one.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Six of us. Old college friends. First time we've all been together in a while, actually.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Right? Nadia mentioned the area — well, she mentioned it, I found the listing. Same thing.
He gave her the credit without checking whether it was his idea to begin with.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: We're doing a bonfire tonight if you two want to come by. Nothing fancy. Just a fire, good people.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: You been to this stretch of coast before?

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Good. You're going to like it. I'll tell Dean to keep the fire going.

blocks.prompt: What does Julian make of him?

options.label: The kind of person everyone orbits without realizing it.
Nadia mentioned the area. He found the listing. He thinks it was his idea.
